chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 275 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «لاَ بَأْسَ بِالْخِضَابِ كُلِّهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.275 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"There is no harm in any kind of dyeing."
